data.title: Over 247,000 Potomac Edison residential customers in Maryland to receive energy relief bill credits in February.
data.description: In Williamsport, Maryland, on January 30, 2026, it was announced that over 247,000 residential customers of Potomac Edison in Maryland will receive automatic bill credits in February. This initiative is part of the state's Legislative Energy Relief Refund program.

data.title: CobbleStone Software in Princeton achieves FedRAMP Ready status, progressing authorization efforts; seeks sponsor.
data.description: CobbleStone Software has recently revealed its FedRAMP Ready status as part of its progress in authorization attempts, and is now in search of a sponsor to aid in moving the process forward. This was announced in Princeton, N.J., on Jan. 30, 2026. CobbleStone Software, known as a top player in contract lifecycle management (CLM), is taking these steps to bolster its standing.

data.title: LogicGate had a successful year in 2025 with industry recognition and significant growth, making it their strongest year yet.
data.description: In the bustling city of Chicago on January 30, 2026, LogicGate revealed that 2025 marked a significant milestone for the company. The renowned AI-powered GRC platform for enterprise showcased remarkable leadership acknowledgment, sustained business expansion, and the introduction of pioneering Intentional AI, culminating in the most successful year to date. This year, LogicGate thrived like never before, positioning itself as a frontrunner in technological advancements and corporate achievements.

data.title: SNIPES X SAUCONY® launch "City Lights" collection, fusing running heritage with street culture. Featuring parkour athletes.

data.title: Janus Henderson Group Q4 earnings up, beats estimates with EPS of $2.01 (69% higher) and revenue up by $433.70 million.
data.description: Janus Henderson Group (NYSE: JHG) released its Q4 earnings on January 30, 2026 at 07:30 AM. The earnings report revealed that the company surpassed estimated earnings by 69.0%, with an EPS of $2.01 compared to the estimated $1.19. Revenue also saw an increase of $433.70 million from the previous year. In the previous earnings report, the company outperformed expectations in terms of EPS. For additional details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.description: Tompkins Finl (AMEX: TMP) released its Q4 earnings on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 09:00 AM. The company surpassed estimated earnings by 5.0%, posting an EPS of $1.78 compared to the expected $1.7. Revenue saw a $12.53 million increase from the corresponding period the prior year. data.title: Germany's GDP rose 0.4% in Q4, 0.3% QoQ; GDP grew 0.2% in 2025. Manufacturing output fell 1.3% in 2025 despite improved GDP figures.
data.description: Germany's GDP increased by 0.4% annually in the fourth quarter of 2025, with a 0.3% quarterly rise driven by household and government spending. Despite challenges such as falling exports and manufacturing struggles, the growth beat analysts' expectations of 0.2%. The economy expanded by 0.2% for the year, breaking a two-year trend of recession, although exports faced tough competition from the US and China. Overseas sales dropped by 0.3% due to factors like US tariffs, a stronger euro, and Chinese competition. Germany's Economy Minister emphasized the need for new growth sectors like digitalization and artificial intelligence. Despite the positive GDP figures, German manufacturing output fell by 1.3% in 2025, impacted by stiff global competition and decreasing market share. German factory output has declined for the third consecutive year, with manufacturing economic value-added down 7% since 2017, according to Goldman Sachs Research. China's manufacturing competitiveness is expected to continue affecting German exports in the future.

data.title: Can decentralized GPU networks still contribute to AI with hyperscale centers dominating training but real potential in inference?
data.description: The majority of AI training is currently conducted in hyperscale data centers, with a few large data centers processing the bulk of the workload. However, as inference and daily tasks become more prevalent, there is a growing opportunity for decentralized GPU networks to play a significant role. This shift indicates a potential opening for smaller scale GPU networks to handle a portion of the processing load, diversifying the landscape of AI computation.

data.title: Verisave introduces program for professional services firms to optimize credit card processing fees. Create new revenue stream.
data.description: Verisave, a consulting firm based in Salt Lake City, announced on January 30, 2026, a new opportunity for business advisors, consultants, CPAs, and private equity firms to generate additional revenue. Through their partner network, these professionals can now provide their clients with card processing optimization services. This initiative aims to help businesses reduce their merchant account costs.

data.title: "GLP-1 Analogues Market expands due to rise in diabetes/obesity rates. Forecast predicts growth through 2030. Report by ResearchAndMarkets.com."
data.description: Dublin - A recent market report on GLP-1 Analogues has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report delves into detailed information regarding glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) analogues. It covers market trends for GLP-1 analogues, encompassing data from 2024, estimates for 2025, and forecasts compound annual growth rates (CAGRs) up to 2030 (spanning the forecast period 2025-2030). The report also provides insights into regional markets for GLP-1 analogues, showcasing the current and future market potential of GLP-1 analogues.

data.title: Washington has approved cryptocurrencies, marking a significant milestone in the industry's growth.
data.description: Due to the ongoing pandemic, a total of 1,500 small businesses in the city have permanently closed their doors. This has resulted in a loss of approximately 5,000 jobs, impacting the local economy significantly. The closure of these businesses has left many individuals struggling to find alternative employment opportunities. Additionally, many residents who relied on these small businesses for goods and services are now forced to look elsewhere. The city government is working on implementing measures to support the remaining small businesses and stimulate economic recovery in the area.

data.title: US travelers lost 1.5M hours due to flight delays in 2025. SkyRefund analyzed BTS data to reveal causes.
data.description: In Sofia, Bulgaria, as of Jan. 30, 2026, it was reported that delayed flights in 2025 led to American travelers collectively waiting a total of 1.5 million hours, equivalent to 171 years, based on information from the Bureau of Transportation Statistics (BTS). SkyRefund, a legal tech-based company specialized in handling air passenger claims, further investigated this data...

data.title: Republic Bancorp Q4 earnings missed estimates by -11%, reporting $1.17 EPS vs. $1.31 estimate. Revenue was up $3.42M.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Republic Bancorp (NASDAQ: RBCAA) released its Q4 earnings report at 08:00 AM, revealing key data for investors. The report showed that the company fell short of estimated earnings by -11.0%, reporting an EPS of $1.17 compared to the expected $1.31. Additionally, revenue increased by $3.42 million compared to the previous year. In terms of past performance, Republic Bancorp had beaten EPS estimates. For a detailed analysis, visit Benzinga.com.
